category.scope_note: Home and clinical medical device comparison.

title.en: China-to-Canada Medical Device Compliance Gap Matrix
title.zh: 中国医疗器械进入加拿大：合规差距矩阵
title.zht: 中國醫療器材進入加拿大：合規差距矩陣

description.en: Public-interest, source-linked comparison of common China home and clinical medical device documentation against Canadian Medical Devices Regulations SOR/98-282 requirements: device classification (MDL/MDEL), MDSAP-certified ISO 13485 QMS, electromedical safety (CAN/CSA-C22.2 No. 60601-1 / IEC 62304), clinical and safety-effectiveness evidence, Regulatory Correspondent and MDEL, and bilingual (English + French) labelling with Canadian UDI.
description.zh: 公益性、带来源链接的中国家用/临床医疗器械文件与加拿大《医疗器械条例》SOR/98-282要求对照，涵盖器械分类（MDL/MDEL）、MDSAP认证ISO 13485质量管理体系、电医疗安全（CAN/CSA-C22.2 No. 60601-1 / IEC 62304）、临床及安全有效性证据、法规联络人与MDEL、英法双语标签及加拿大UDI差距分析。
description.zht: 公益性、附來源連結的中國家用/臨床醫療器材文件與加拿大《醫療器械條例》SOR/98-282要求對照，涵蓋器械分類（MDL/MDEL）、MDSAP認證ISO 13485品質管理系統、電醫療安全（CAN/CSA-C22.2 No. 60601-1 / IEC 62304）、臨床及安全有效性證據、法規聯絡人與MDEL、英法雙語標籤及加拿大UDI差距分析。

disclaimer.en: This page is an informational comparison aid, not a certification decision, legal opinion, Health Canada MDL or MDEL determination, MDSAP audit result, clinical evaluation, QMS audit result, customs determination, or market-access approval. Exporters, importers, and manufacturers should verify current Health Canada classification, MDL/MDEL, MDSAP, safety-effectiveness evidence, labelling, UDI, and Regulatory Correspondent obligations with qualified Canadian regulatory affairs professionals before shipment or placing on the Canadian market. Regulatory requirements may change; always consult the current version of the Medical Devices Regulations SOR/98-282 and official Health Canada guidance.
disclaimer.zh: 本页仅为信息性对照工具，不构成认证结论、法律意见、加拿大卫生部MDL或MDEL裁定、MDSAP审核结果、临床评价、质量体系审核结果、海关裁定或市场准入批准。出口商、进口商和制造商在出货或在加拿大市场上市前，应与具备资质的加拿大法规事务专业人士核验现行加拿大卫生部分类、MDL/MDEL、MDSAP、安全有效性证据、标签、UDI及法规联络人义务。法规要求可能有所变更，请始终参阅现行《医疗器械条例》SOR/98-282及加拿大卫生部官方指南。
disclaimer.zht: 本頁僅為資訊性對照工具，不構成認證結論、法律意見、加拿大衛生部MDL或MDEL裁定、MDSAP審核結果、臨床評估、品質系統審核結果、海關裁定或市場准入批准。出口商、進口商和製造商在出貨或在加拿大市場上市前，應與具備資歷的加拿大法規事務專業人士核驗現行加拿大衛生部分類、MDL/MDEL、MDSAP、安全有效性證據、標籤、UDI及法規聯絡人義務。法規要求可能有所變更，請始終參閱現行《醫療器械條例》SOR/98-282及加拿大衛生部官方指引。

answer_first.en: MDSAP-certified ISO 13485 QMS (mandatory for Class II–IV since 2019), a Canadian MDL, an MDEL for the importer, a Regulatory Correspondent with a Canadian address on the label, bilingual English-and-French labelling, and a Canadian UDI are the main gaps beyond NMPA; CAN/CSA-C22.2 No. 60601-1 safety largely transfers from GB 9706.1-2020 given the shared IEC 60601-1 Ed.3 base.
answer_first.zh: MDSAP认证的ISO 13485质量管理体系（2019年起II–IV类强制要求）、加拿大MDL、进口商MDEL、标签上须标注加拿大地址的法规联络人、英法双语标签及加拿大UDI，是NMPA之外的主要差距；鉴于CAN/CSA-C22.2 No. 60601-1与GB 9706.1-2020共同基于IEC 60601-1第三版，电气安全要求大体可从中国测试数据转移。
answer_first.zht: MDSAP認證的ISO 13485品質管理系統（2019年起II–IV類強制要求）、加拿大MDL、進口商MDEL、標籤上須標注加拿大地址的法規聯絡人、英法雙語標籤及加拿大UDI，是NMPA之外的主要差距；鑑於CAN/CSA-C22.2 No. 60601-1與GB 9706.1-2020共同基於IEC 60601-1第三版，電氣安全要求大體可從中國測試數據轉移。

editorial_controls.source_policy: Official regulator, standards body, or primary legal source preferred. Official Government of Canada (canada.ca, hc-sc.gc.ca, laws-lois.justice.gc.ca) and IMDRF sources. Local PDFs are not accepted.
editorial_controls.change_control: Rows must include publisher, official URL, access date, verification flag, and last_verified before human_reviewed can be true.
